vocab.example: I gravitate towards street photography because I love capturing fleeting moments of human emotion that would otherwise be forgotten.

vocab.meaning: sự đan xen giữa ánh sáng và bóng tối
vocab.example: In my architectural photos, I always look for a dramatic play of light and shadow to create a sense of depth.
I prefer a documentary style when I travel, focusing on the authentic daily lives of locals rather than staged tourist shots.

vocab.meaning: tác động mạnh mẽ đến cảm xúc/bản năng
vocab.example: Black and white portraiture often has a more visceral impact on the viewer by stripping away distracting colors.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp của sự hoang tàn/xuống cấp nơi đô thị
vocab.example: I find the aesthetic of urban decay quite fascinating, so I frequently photograph abandoned warehouses and weathered walls.

vocab.meaning: những màu sắc rực rỡ/sống động
vocab.example: During the autumn months, I’m obsessed with capturing the vibrant hues of the changing foliage in the countryside.
I believe unposed photos are the most truthful way to represent a person's character and personality.

vocab.meaning: sự cân bằng trong bố cục
vocab.example: I spend a lot of time perfecting the compositional balance of my landscape shots to ensure they look harmonious.

vocab.meaning: giờ vàng (khoảng thời gian ngay sau khi bình minh hoặc trước hoàng hôn)
vocab.example: I try to plan all my outdoor shoots during the golden hour to take advantage of the soft, warm sunlight.
I aim to produce evocative images that tell a story and resonate with people on a personal level.
